case_title: KYAW KYAW MYINT VS. ELIZABETH Z DOW et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT AAA INSURANCE WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN BEAULIEW--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH DOW WAS REPRESENTED BY HUSBAND. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AAA INSURANCE #03-1VH437-7
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,389.51 FILED BY MYINT, KYAW KYAW (DBA) JOJO TRANSPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DOW, ELIZABETH Z AAA INSURANCE #03-1VH437-7 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-07-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOW, ELIZABETH Z

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MYINT, KYAW KYAW (DBA) JOJO TRANSPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOW, ELIZABETH Z PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST AAA INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO AAA INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-26-2012 AT 3:30 PM.
